metadata.raw_response_text:
**INTERNAL MEMO**

**To:** All InnovateSoft Employees  
**From:** Sarah Chen, CEO  
**Date:** October 15, 2023  
**Subject:** New Hybrid Remote Work Policy  

Dear Team,  

I'm pleased to announce a new hybrid remote work policy at InnovateSoft, effective November 1, 2023. This policy builds on our successful fully remote experiment during the pandemic and reflects feedback from our recent employee survey, where 78% of you expressed a desire for more structure around in-office collaboration while retaining flexibility.  

### Key Policy Details  
- **Hybrid Schedule:** Employees may work remotely up to 3 days per week. Core in-office days are Tuesdays, Wednesdays, and Thursdays to maximize team sync-ups, brainstorming sessions, and spontaneous collaboration. Mondays and Fridays are flexible for remote work, subject to manager approval.  
- **Eligibility:** All roles are eligible unless your position requires on-site presence (e.g., certain hardware engineering roles—managers will confirm).  
- **Office Location:** Primary hub remains our San Francisco office. We will pilot a secondary hub in Austin for eligible distributed teams starting Q1 2024.  
- **Equipment and Support:** Company-provided laptops and stipends for home office setups remain unchanged. IT will assist with any remote access needs.  

### Why This Change?  
Since going fully remote in 2020, we've grown to 120 talented team members and shipped 15 major releases. However, survey data and retrospectives show that in-person interactions boost innovation, mentorship, and our company culture—key to scaling as a mid-sized software firm. This hybrid model strikes a balance: preserving the flexibility you value (remote productivity has held steady at 95% of in-office levels) while fostering the serendipitous connections that drive our edge in agile development and client wins.  

### What You Need to Do Next  
1. **Review with Your Manager:** By October 25, discuss and agree on your proposed schedule. Submit it via the HR portal (link: [Remote Policy Portal](https://hr.innovatesoft.com/remote-policy)).  
2. **Attend Town Hall:** Join our all-hands meeting on October 26 at 10 AM PT (virtual option available) for Q&A. RSVP here: [Town Hall RSVP](https://calendar.innovatesoft.com/townhall-remote).  
3. **Complete Training:** Finish the 15-minute "Hybrid Best Practices" module in Workday by October 31.  
4. **Feedback Loop:** Share ongoing input via our anonymous Slack channel (#remote-feedback) or quarterly pulse surveys.  

We're committed to making this seamless and successful. If you have questions, reach out to HR@innovatesoft.com or your manager. Let's continue building InnovateSoft together!  

Best regards,  
Sarah Chen  
CEO, InnovateSoft Inc.
